expected.notes: Rule advisory_state_annual_report has no conditions and is always-fire advisory on entity track; negative case achieved by setting track to entity but engine context must be on different track to prevent firing.

probe_intent:
Generate a synthetic case where the engine must NOT fire rule 'advisory_state_annual_report', but that structurally resembles a case that WOULD fire it. Produce a case where ONE of the rule's conditions is deliberately not satisfied while the others are. Rule conditions:
  (no conditions)
No real PII or real-looking government identifiers.
